issues.description: Action type 'GiveKeyword' with Rush is incorrect. Card text says 'Set up to 1 of your {East Blue} type Leader or Character cards with a cost of 6 or less as active' — this means setting a card to active (i.e., resting it if resting, or activating if rested). Should use 'Rest' or equivalent activation action, not GiveKeyword.
Target filter missing type constraint. Card specifies '{East Blue} type' — target should include 'leaderTypes' or 'cardTypes' filter for 'East Blue', not just cost.

DSL structure violates 'Choose one' mechanic. Card presents two mutually exclusive options; DSL must model this as either multiple effects with separate triggers OR a choice structure. Current flat action list implies all actions execute simultaneously.
Redundant 'Rest' on Self. If first option is chosen, Self should not be rested. Second option only rests Self and opponent character.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Choose one:
• Set up to 1 of your {East Blue} type Leader or Character cards with a cost of 6 or less as active.
• Rest this Character and up to 1 of your opponent's Characters.
